title: Triazolopyrimidines Target Aerobic Respiration in Mycobacterium tuberculosis
author_string: Shelton, Catherine, McNeil, Matthew, Allen, Renee, Flint, Lindsay, Russell, Dara et al.
abstract:
We previously identified a series of triazolopyrimidines with antitubercular activity. We determined that
                    Mycobacterium tuberculosis
                    strains with mutations in QcrB, a subunit of the cytochrome
                    bcc-aa3
                    supercomplex, were resistant.
